_note: Teaching fixture. Shape `intent chains ./intent` is PLANNED to emit. Hand-authored to illustrate Mission Chains.

chains.name: New Customer Signup
chains.journey: A person goes from no account to an active workspace member.
chains.readinessReason: InviteTeamMember is only partially verified (1/2 tests), so the invite-to-join hop is not proven end to end.

chains.name: Subscription Billing
chains.journey: A workspace picks a plan and gets billed.
chains.readinessReason: CreateCheckoutSession is drifting (1/5 tests) and ActivateSubscription is not yet authored, so the paid path cannot be trusted.

teaching: Every mission in a chain can pass its own check while the chain is still not ready. Chains measure end-to-end readiness; missions measure per-unit correctness.
